title: bromus mollis var. molliformis
intro: Bromus mollis var. molliformis, also known as soft brome, is a type of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects, which can help soothe wounds and reduce swelling. The health benefits of soft brome include its ability to aid in digestion, relieve stress, and promote respiratory health. Soft brome can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
